name: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria
description: Representative Common Criteria mapped to Azure implementations. Summaries are paraphrased.

controls.title: Logical access security
controls.summary: Logical access to systems and data is restricted through security software, infrastructure, and architectures.
controls.remediation: Entra ID SSO with MFA and Conditional Access, RBAC least privilege, network restrictions on data services.

controls.title: Boundary protection
controls.summary: Threats from outside system boundaries are mitigated at controlled entry points.
controls.remediation: WAF at ingress, Azure Firewall for egress, deny-by-default NSGs, DDoS protection for public endpoints.

controls.title: Data transmission and movement
controls.summary: Data in transit and on removable/portable media is protected.
controls.remediation: TLS 1.2+ on all channels, private endpoints for internal data paths, encrypted exports only.

controls.title: Vulnerability detection
controls.summary: Configuration changes and new vulnerabilities are detected and evaluated.
controls.remediation: Defender vulnerability management, CI dependency/image scanning, and Azure Policy drift detection.

controls.title: Anomaly monitoring
controls.summary: System components are monitored for anomalies indicating malicious acts or errors.
controls.remediation: Centralized logging with analytics rules, alert triage runbooks, and retention meeting audit requirements.

controls.title: Incident response
controls.summary: Security incidents are responded to through an understood program of containment, remediation, and communication.
controls.remediation: Documented IR plan with roles, Sentinel/Defender automation for containment, and stakeholder communication templates.

controls.title: Change management
controls.summary: Infrastructure, data, and software changes are authorized, designed, tested, approved, and implemented in a controlled way.
controls.remediation: All changes via PR-reviewed IaC and pipelines, environment promotion gates, and audit trail in GitHub.

controls.title: Availability — recovery infrastructure
controls.summary: Recovery infrastructure and data backup processes support availability commitments.
controls.remediation: Zone redundancy for critical tiers, geo-backup, documented RTO/RPO, and restore testing.
